title: ModWatch
description: The ultimate all-in-one security suite for total mod control and automated fair play on your server.
body:
ModWatch

The ultimate bridge between Server Administration and Player Integrity.

--- ## What is ModWatch? **ModWatch** is a synchronization system designed to give server owners full visibility into the client-side environment of their players. By pairing a **Bukkit/Spigot/Paper plugin** with a lightweight **Fabric client mod**, you can ensure that your server remains a fair playground for everyone. > [!NOTE] > **For Players:** You only need to install the **Client Mod**. > **For Server Owners:** You need to install the **Server Plugin** on your server. --- ## Why choose ModWatch? - **Instant Insight**: Admins can see a full list of a player's mods and active resource packs with a single command. - **Automated Blacklist**: Instantly punish players using forbidden IDs like `xray`, `wurst`, or `freecam`. - **Periodic Challenges**: Our unique security layer sends hidden verification "challenges" every 30 seconds to ensure players can't bypass the check after joining. - **Global Search**: Want to know who's using a specific mod? Use `/modwatch find ` to scan everyone online. - **Anti-Outdated**: Enforce a minimum version of the mod to keep your security standards high. --- ## Advanced Security ModWatch doesn't just check once on join. It uses a **Challenge-Response** protocol: 1. **Join Handshake**: 2 seconds after joining, the server requests data. 2. **Periodic Pings**: Every 30 seconds, a new random challenge is generated. 3. **Verification**: If a client fails to reply or sends an invalid response, they are immediately kicked. 4. **Resilience**: Optimized networking handles connection spikes and cross-platform communication seamlessly. --- ## Media

Kick message if you have a mod that is blacklisted

--- ## Commands & Permissions | Command | Action | Permission | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | `/modwatch ` | Inspect a player's mods/packs | `modwatch.admin` | | `/modwatch find ` | Search all players for a mod | `modwatch.admin` | | `/modwatch reload` | Reload the config & blacklist | `modwatch.admin` | --- ## Installation ### For Players 1. Download the **latest client JAR**. 2. Drop it into your `.minecraft/mods` folder. 3. Requires **Fabric API** & **Minecraft 1.21.1**. ### For Server Admins 1. Download the **latest plugin JAR**. 2. Drop it into your server's `plugins` folder. 3. Configure your blacklist in `plugins/ModWatch/config.yml`. [![Nexeu.zip](https://i.ibb.co/HDJnHpvZ/nexeu-banner-v5.png)](https://nexeu.zip/) ---

Created with precision for the Minecraft community.
